description_long: This is a modern, rectangular filing cabinet constructed from light-colored wood with a natural grain pattern. The front features four wide, flat drawers with no visible handles, giving it a minimalist and seamless appearance. The cabinet stands on two black, V-shaped metal legs that elevate it slightly off the ground, adding a touch of industrial style. The sides and back are plain, with the same wood finish as the front, and the top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing items. The drawers are likely to be opened via a push-to-open mechanism or a concealed groove at the top edge of each drawer. This piece is designed for organized storage and would fit well in contemporary urban environments.
description: A minimalist, light wood filing cabinet with four seamless drawers and black metal legs, featuring a smooth, flat top and a modern design.
description_view_0: The front view shows four wide, handle-less drawers with a natural wood grain and black metal legs.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain, flat wooden panel with the cabinet's depth and the black metal leg visible.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a featureless wooden panel matching the rest of the cabinet, with both black legs visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain wooden side and a single black metal leg.
